entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop studied for disease resistance

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola affecting pearl millet

entities.name: GENETIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent ability of pearl millet lines to resist downy mildew infection

entities.name: MALE-STERILE LINES
entities.description: A-lines used as parental lines in the production of hybrid pearl millet

entities.name: CMS SYSTEM
entities.description: Cytoplasmic-nuclear male-sterility system used for hybrid seed production

entities.name: F1 HYBRID CULTIVARS
entities.description: First-generation hybrid cultivars developed from parental lines

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the field experiments and pathotype collection took place

entities.name: PATHOTYPE ISOLATES
entities.description: Different genetic variants of Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: GREENHOUSE ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Controlled settings used to confirm resistance against specific pathotypes

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW INCIDENCE
entities.description: The percentage of disease occurrence used to evaluate resistance

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to group pearl millet lines based on disease incidence

entities.name: EUCLIDIAN DISTANCE
entities.description: The distance measure used within the cluster analysis

entities.name: LINE X PATHOTYPE INTERACTION
entities.description: The combined effect of genetic line and pathogen pathotype on disease incidence

relationships.description: is the location where the disease is studied
